title: Last Hope Hero makes critical retaliation when primary is killed

card.rawText: Play this from your hand when your primary creature is killed. Roll its base Atk Dice Rolls and Modifier against the creature that killed it. This attack is treated as a Critical Hit.

effect.value: Play this from your hand when your primary creature is killed. Roll its base Atk Dice Rolls and Modifier against the creature that killed it. This attack is treated as a Critical Hit.
